title: statsapps
text: statsapps R package features interactive Shiny apps help learn concepts data science & statistics.

title: statsapps
text: can install development version statsapps GitHub repo :

title: statsapps
text: apps can started via functions statsapps. app can started using function begins run_. example, use run_permutation_app() start Shiny app Permutation Test.  open new window Shiny app. recommended hit “Open Browser” button top get best view app. open app default web browser.  example showcase Permutation Test app, demonstrates repeated random reassignment observations can used build null distribution two-sample permutation test. statsapps, app interactive allows see results individual permutations, result permutation incrementally builds null distribution. several tabs within main window app. first two tabs provide explanation original data. third tab shows results performing permutations. buttons left sidebar allow perform permutations visualize outcome recent permutation.
